creator: mwisnicki+freebsd@gmail.com
text:
Ports net/isc-dhcp30-{client,relay,server} were removed however no entries were added to MOVED file to aid in automatic upgrade to later version.

Fix: 

cat << EOT >> /usr/ports/MOVED
net/isc-dhcp30-server|net/isc-dhcp31-server|2010-07-09|Has expired: EOL
net/isc-dhcp30-relay|net/isc-dhcp31-relay|2010-07-09|Has expired: EOL
net/isc-dhcp30-client|net/isc-dhcp31-client|2010-07-09|Has expired: EOL
EOT
